title: Indian Shrimp Pancakes
description: A fusion of Indian and Southeast Asian flavors, these shrimp pancakes are a delicious and easy meal. The flaky pancake exterior gives way to a spicy shrimp filling.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine 1 cup of flaky pancake mix, 1/4 cup of green chutney paste, and 1/4 cup of water to make the pancake batter.
Heat 1 tablespoon of mustard oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the cooked shrimp to the pancake batter and mix well.
Heat another tablespoon of mustard oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the pancake batter and pour onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 2 minutes.
Serve hot with cumin seeds sprinkled on top.
